mapper.insert: insert into generation_task ( task_id, session_id, final_requirements, template_id, material_ids, status, progress, ppt_url, doc_url, game_url, outline, fail_reason, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{taskId}, #{sessionId}, #{finalRequirements}, #{templateId}, #{materialIds}, #{status}, #{progress}, #{pptUrl}, #{docUrl}, #{gameUrl}, #{outline}, #{failReason}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: select id, task_id, session_id, final_requirements, template_id, material_ids, status, progress, ppt_url, doc_url, game_url, outline, fail_reason, create_time, update_time from generation_task where session_id = #{sessionId} order by create_time desc limit 1

select id, task_id, session_id, final_requirements, template_id, material_ids, status, progress, ppt_url, doc_url, game_url, outline, fail_reason, create_time, update_time from generation_task where task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.update: update generation_task set final_requirements = #{finalRequirements}, status = #{status}, progress = #{progress}, ppt_url = #{pptUrl}, doc_url = #{docUrl}, game_url = #{gameUrl}, outline = #{outline}, fail_reason = #{failReason}, update_time = now() where task_id = #{taskId}
update generation_task set task_id = #{taskId}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
